response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most recent work centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang; while they have brief C++ exposure from 2014–2015, there is no evidence of recent hands-on development with STL, multi-threading, message brokers, or IEC 62443 security standards critical to the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across diverse domains.
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and technical mentoring via workshops.
Proven ability to build scalable, event-driven systems and contribute to DevOps infrastructure.
concerns: No recent C++ or STL work in the last 9+ years; core technical requirement unmet.
Lacks exposure to industrial IoT protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850) and secure development lifecycle (SDL) in industrial contexts.
No demonstrated experience with cloud platforms (Azure), MQTT, or real-time embedded systems required for on-prem/cloud automation solutions.
